name: EdwAcaPgmPaymtRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'FINANCE_ACAPGMPAYMT' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T INNER JOIN cte ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
MODIFICATIONS:

PROCESSING: Updates the EDW_LOAD_IN on the P_RUN_CYC table for ACA_PGM_PAYMT

Developer                          Date               Project/Altiris #               Change Description                             Development Project    Code Reviewer            Date Reviewed

Annotations:
JobName:
EdwAcaPgmPaymtRunCycUpdt_EE
EDW AcaPgmPaymt Run Cycle Extract & Load Indicator Update
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
buffer
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS AcaPgmPaymt with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is greater than or equal to the current run cycle used for extracting.
